ModMetaData.name: More Monster Girls Enhanced Patch
ModMetaData.author: wagon
ModMetaData.description:
Enhanced version of wagon's MoreMonstergirls
This is the Enhanced version, a patch for the main mod that give additional abilities to monstergirls.
Monstergirls that have finished Obedience training can: - Clean - Mine - Cut Plants - Slaughter marked creatures - Strip marked people
Of course, they can haul too when the training is done.
This is working for all monster girls that have advanced intelligence; which means all of them besides Slimes.
Loading order: - CORE - More Monster Girls - More Monster Girls Enhanced Patch
All credit due to the original author of this mod, wagon!
